authMethods.name: Login with ChatGPT
authMethods.description: Use your ChatGPT login with Codex CLI (requires a paid ChatGPT subscription)

availableModels.name: gpt-5.3-codex (low)
availableModels.description: Latest frontier agentic coding model. Fast responses with lighter reasoning

availableModels.name: gpt-5.3-codex (medium)
availableModels.description: Latest frontier agentic coding model. Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks

availableModels.name: gpt-5.3-codex (high)
availableModels.description: Latest frontier agentic coding model. Greater reasoning depth for complex problems

availableModels.name: gpt-5.3-codex (xhigh)
availableModels.description: Latest frontier agentic coding model. Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems

availableModels.name: gpt-5.2-codex (low)
availableModels.description: Frontier agentic coding model. Fast responses with lighter reasoning

availableModels.name: gpt-5.2-codex (medium)
availableModels.description: Frontier agentic coding model. Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks

availableModels.name: gpt-5.2-codex (high)
availableModels.description: Frontier agentic coding model. Greater reasoning depth for complex problems

availableModels.name: gpt-5.2-codex (xhigh)
availableModels.description: Frontier agentic coding model. Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems

availableModels.name: gpt-5.1-codex-max (low)
availableModels.description: Codex-optimized flagship for deep and fast reasoning. Fast responses with lighter reasoning

availableModels.name: gpt-5.1-codex-max (medium)
availableModels.description: Codex-optimized flagship for deep and fast reasoning. Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks

availableModels.name: gpt-5.1-codex-max (high)
availableModels.description: Codex-optimized flagship for deep and fast reasoning. Greater reasoning depth for complex problems

availableModels.name: gpt-5.1-codex-max (xhigh)
availableModels.description: Codex-optimized flagship for deep and fast reasoning. Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems

availableModels.name: gpt-5.2 (low)
availableModels.description: Latest frontier model with improvements across knowledge, reasoning and coding Balances speed with some reasoning; useful for straightforward queries and short explanations

availableModels.name: gpt-5.2 (medium)
availableModels.description: Latest frontier model with improvements across knowledge, reasoning and coding Provides a solid balance of reasoning depth and latency for general-purpose tasks

availableModels.name: gpt-5.2 (high)
availableModels.description: Latest frontier model with improvements across knowledge, reasoning and coding Maximizes reasoning depth for complex or ambiguous problems

availableModels.name: gpt-5.2 (xhigh)
availableModels.description: Latest frontier model with improvements across knowledge, reasoning and coding Extra high reasoning for complex problems

availableModels.name: gpt-5.1-codex-mini (medium)
availableModels.description: Optimized for codex. Cheaper, faster, but less capable. Dynamically adjusts reasoning based on the task

availableModels.name: gpt-5.1-codex-mini (high)
availableModels.description: Optimized for codex. Cheaper, faster, but less capable. Maximizes reasoning depth for complex or ambiguous problems

configOptions.name: Model

availableCommands.description: create an AGENTS.md file with instructions for Codex

availableCommands.description: summarize conversation to prevent hitting the context limit

availableCommands.description: Implement tasks from an OpenSpec change (Experimental)

availableCommands.description: Archive multiple completed changes at once

availableCommands.description: Continue working on a change - create the next artifact (Experimental)

availableCommands.description: Enter explore mode - think through ideas, investigate problems, clarify requirements

availableCommands.description: Create a change and generate all artifacts needed for implementation in one go

availableCommands.description: Start a new change using the experimental artifact workflow (OPSX)

availableCommands.name: opsx-onboard
availableCommands.description: Guided onboarding - walk through a complete OpenSpec workflow cycle with narration

availableCommands.description: Sync delta specs from a change to main specs

availableCommands.description: Verify implementation matches change artifacts before archiving
